com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.struct

Class PStruct

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.struct.PStruct

  • public class PStruct
extends java.lang.Object
    A typed view over one struct element; subclass it and expose named accessors.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void clear()
      Zeroes every field.
      boolean getBoolean(java.lang.String name)
      Reads the BOOLEAN field by name.

      Reads the BOOLEAN field.

      Reads the BYTE field by name.

      Reads the BYTE field.

      Reads the CHAR field by name.

      Reads the CHAR field.

      Reads the SHORT field by name.

      Reads the SHORT field.

    • Method Detail

      • index

        public long index()
        Returns:
        the element index this view points at

      • moveTo

        public PStruct moveTo(long index)
        Repositions this view to index.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        Returns:
        this view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • layout

        public StructLayout layout()
        Returns:
        the struct layout

      • getBoolean

        public boolean getBoolean(StructField field)
        Reads the BOOLEAN field.
        Parameters:
        field - the field handle
        Returns:
        the value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if field is foreign or not BOOLEAN
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

                          boolean value)

        Returns:

        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
